escapePointAnchor: Alignment plus takeoff initiation on RWY 26 as if RWY 22
perceptionRationaleShort: Runway cues existed but were not integrated before roll commitment
objectiveRationaleShort: Objective remained normal departure continuity at gate window
actionRationaleShort: Action chain shows crossing, alignment, and continuation on incompatible runway

escapePointAnchor: Energy-speed margin outside defensible range before stick shaker
perceptionRationaleShort: At-gate perception state cannot be safely fixed without post-gate leakage
objectiveRationaleShort: Approach objective continuity is factually present before upset
actionRationaleShort: No stabilizing recovery is evidenced before shaker at selected threshold

escapePointAnchor: Established localizer with non-defensible vertical profile before MDA
perceptionRationaleShort: Profile and speed cues were available before MDA crossing
objectiveRationaleShort: Objective remained landing completion via nonprecision approach
actionRationaleShort: Continuation under unstable profile occurred before MDA threshold

escapePointAnchor: Takeoff-climb interval with non-defensible pressurization state until cabin warning
perceptionRationaleShort: Recognition state is ambiguous within interval and capability degradation window
objectiveRationaleShort: Line-level objective attribution is uncertain during interval progression
actionRationaleShort: Continuation of climb with unresolved pressurization state is factually observable

escapePointAnchor: Bird strike with near-total bilateral thrust loss during initial climb
perceptionRationaleShort: Onset is technical-environmental and not human-origin
objectiveRationaleShort: Onset objective axis remains non-human at escape point
actionRationaleShort: Onset action axis remains non-human at escape point
